display_text: Snapfire Aghanim's Scepter: Spit Out — Counters clustered enemy formations with high-impact AoE stun and damage-over-time zone control. Transforms Snapfire into a potent teamfight disruptor by creating denial zones that punish enemy positioning.
search_text: Snapfire Aghanim Scepter anti-cluster AoE stun zone control teamfight disruptor

display_text: Snapfire Aghanim's Shard: Firesnap Cookie — Counters burst damage by providing emergency healing alongside offensive repositioning. Enhances Snapfire's hybrid support/carry role by adding sustain to her aggressive initiation toolkit.
